csharpCode: using UnityEngine; using UnityEngine.UI; using UnityEditor; public class Script { public static string Main() { string r = ""; string efxFolder = "Assets/Prefabs/Effects"; r += CreateParticle(efxFolder, "MatchStar", 0.8f, 10, 0.4f, 5f, ParticleSystemShapeType.Circle, 0.2f); r += CreateParticle(efxFolder, "MatchGlow", 0.3f, 8, 0.5f, 2f, ParticleSystemShapeType.Circle, 0.4f); r += CreateParticle(efxFolder, "MatchRing", 0.4f, 12, 0.2f, 6f, ParticleSystemShapeType.Circle, 0.5f); string uiFolder = "Assets/Prefabs/UI"; if (AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<GameObject>(uiFolder + "/BoosterButton.prefab") == null) { var bb = new GameObject("BoosterButton"); var img = bb.AddComponent<Image>(); img.color = new Color(0.3f, 0.6f, 0.9f); bb.AddComponent<Button>(); var rt = bb.GetComponent<RectTransform>(); rt.sizeDelta = new Vector2(120, 120); var txt = new GameObject("CountText"); txt.transform.SetParent(bb.transform, false); var t = txt.AddComponent<Text>(); t.text = "3"; t.fontSize = 28; t.fontStyle = FontStyle.Bold; t.alignment = TextAnchor.MiddleCenter; t.color = Color.white; t.font = Resources.GetBuiltinResource<Font>("LegacyRuntime.ttf"); var trt = txt.GetComponent<RectTransform>(); trt.anchorMin = Vector2.zero; trt.anchorMax = Vector2.one; trt.offsetMin = Vector2.zero; trt.offsetMax = Vector2.zero; PrefabUtility.SaveAsPrefabAsset(bb, uiFolder + "/BoosterButton.prefab"); Object.DestroyImmediate(bb); r += "BoosterButton | "; } string soFolder = "Assets/ScriptableObjects"; if (!AssetDatabase.IsValidFolder(soFolder)) AssetDatabase.CreateFolder("Assets", "ScriptableObjects"); if (!AssetDatabase.IsValidFolder(soFolder + "/Levels")) AssetDatabase.CreateFolder(soFolder, "Levels"); var gc = ScriptableObject.CreateInstance<Match3.GameConfig>(); AssetDatabase.CreateAsset(gc, soFolder + "/GameConfig.asset"); r += "GameConfig.asset | "; for (int i = 1; i <= 5; i++) { var lc = ScriptableObject.CreateInstance<Match3.LevelConfig>(); AssetDatabase.CreateAsset(lc, soFolder + "/Levels/Level" + i.ToString("D2") + ".asset"); } r += "LevelConfig x5 | "; string atlasFolder = "Assets/SpriteAtlases"; if (!AssetDatabase.IsValidFolder(atlasFolder)) AssetDatabase.CreateFolder("Assets", "SpriteAtlases"); AssetDatabase.Refresh(); return r; } static string CreateParticle(string folder, string name, float duration, int burstCount, float startSize, float startSpeed, ParticleSystemShapeType shape, float radius) { string path = folder + "/" + name + ".prefab"; if (AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<GameObject>(path) != null) return name + " exists | "; var go = new GameObject(name); var ps = go.AddComponent<ParticleSystem>(); var main = ps.main; main.duration = duration; main.loop = false; main.playOnAwake = false; main.startLifetime = duration; main.startSpeed = startSpeed; main.startSize = startSize; main.simulationSpace = ParticleSystemSimulationSpace.World; var em = ps.emission; em.rateOverTime = 0; em.SetBurst(0, new ParticleSystem.Burst(0f, (short)burstCount)); var sh = ps.shape; sh.shapeType = shape; sh.radius = radius; var col = ps.colorOverLifetime; col.enabled = true; var grad = new Gradient(); grad.SetKeys(new GradientColorKey[]{new GradientColorKey(Color.white, 0f), new GradientColorKey(Color.white, 1f)}, new GradientAlphaKey[]{new GradientAlphaKey(1f, 0f), new GradientAlphaKey(0f, 1f)}); col.color = grad; PrefabUtility.SaveAsPrefabAsset(go, path); Object.DestroyImmediate(go); return name + " created | "; } }
